creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 235228
Patch for libuv

Update libuv to 1.44.2

Compile and run tested on 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-n250920-9171b8068b9 (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
